'''Risban''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], and the location of the river [[City/Legends|town]] [[Keremark]]. The town was ruled by the [[Neolsse family]], who opposed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] subjugation from [[Fortress Keremark]].

{{Planet-stub}}
